response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analyzed to separate talk segments (00:00-03:53) from the vocal performance (03:53-05:01). 2. Identified performer as Shirogane Noel, song as 'VAVAVA!バーチャル大分', and composer/lyricist as ケンモチヒデフミ from on-screen text. 3. Used 'VAVAVA バーチャル大分 ケンモチヒデフミ 歌詞' query to retrieve the official lyrics via web search. 4. Structured the findings into the required JSON schema, ensuring timestamps were accurate and lyrics were complete.
response.global_summary: The video features a birthday greeting, merchandise showcase, and a new song announcement for VTuber Shirogane Noel, culminating in the live performance of her new song, 'VAVAVA! Virtual Oita', composed by Kenmochi Hidefumi.

scenes.description: VTuber Shirogane Noel introduces her birthday goods and makes a surprise announcement of a new song. The segment includes an interaction with the mascot 'Mejiron' and a message from the Governor of Oita Prefecture.
Shirogane Noel performs her original song 'VAVAVA! Virtual Oita' on stage. The song highlights various Oita prefecture attractions and phrases.
